agent_summary: Customer reports: "I have been charged twice for the same order, 800 taka each" Classified as duplicate_payment. Evidence cross-checked against Transaction TXN-5002.
recommended_next_action: Confirm the duplicate via ledger query and route to payments operations for official-channel resolution of any eligible duplicate amount.
customer_reply: Thank you for flagging the duplicate charge (reference TXN-5002). Our payments team will verify the records. Any eligible duplicate amount will be processed through our official in-app support channel or hotline.
